# Parallax — @kernel_crush AI/ML Knowledge Graph
# Generated: 2026-05-03
# Format: [domain/slug] Title — Summary
#
# Paste this file into any LLM context to make the full wiki queryable.

## PROJECTS
[projects/decifra] Decifra - End-to-end MLOps fraud detection pipeline with explainable AI.
[projects/deepguard] DeepGuard - Production-grade MLOps pipeline for deepfake detection with complete ML lifecycle implementation.
[projects/field-fusion] Field Fusion - Football match analysis via computer vision — player tracking, team classification, tactical analysis.
[projects/histopathology] Histopathology Analysis - Deep learning system for breast cancer detection with explainable AI and automated clinical reporting.
[projects/insureml-pipeline] InsureML-Pipeline - InsureML-Pipeline is an MLOps system for predicting vehicle insurance cross-sell opportunities. It uses machine learning to identify customers likely to purchase vehicle insurance, optimizing marketin
[projects/molecuquest] MoleCuQuest - AI-driven molecular research platform combining generative AI with computational chemistry.
[projects/quanta-ai] QuantaAI - Intelligent conversational AI with real-time web search and agentic decision-making.
[projects/rppg-heart-rate] rPPG Heart Rate - Contactless heart rate detection from webcam video using deep learning and signal processing.
[projects/tennis-vision] Tennis Vision - Real-time tennis match analysis system. Top project by stars (★27).
[projects/travel-planner] Travel-Planner - The Travel-Planner is a travel planning application utilizing Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) to orchestrate a multi-agent system. It generates comprehensive travel recommendations by leveraging 

## RESEARCH
[research/lora-qlora] LoRA & QLoRA - Pure PyTorch implementations of parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods for LLMs and Vision Transformers.
[research/reasoning-llms] Reasoning LLMs - Research implementation exploring Chain-of-Thought reasoning, inference-time scaling, and RLHF alignment in large language models.
[research/transformers-cv] transformers-CV - Comprehensive library of transformer architectures for computer vision — implemented from scratch in PyTorch.
[research/vision-transformer] Vision Transformer (ViT) - From-scratch PyTorch implementation of "An Image is Worth 16x16 Words" (Dosovitskiy et al., 2020). Standalone project and a core architecture in transformers-cv.
[research/vlmverse] VLMverse — PaLiGemma - Complete from-scratch PyTorch implementation of PaLiGemma vision-language model.

## SKILLS
[skills/computer-vision] Computer Vision - Core domain. Applied across production systems, research, and healthcare.
[skills/deep-learning] Deep Learning - Core foundational expertise in deep learning, focusing on implementing low-level mathematical architectures in PyTorch from first principles.
[skills/genai-agents] GenAI & Agent Systems - Deep focus on agentic AI — building systems that reason, plan, and act autonomously.
[skills/mlops] MLOps - End-to-end ML lifecycle management — from data versioning to production monitoring.

## CONCEPTS
[concepts/attention-mechanisms] Attention Mechanisms - Core concept underlying all modern transformer architectures. Implemented in multiple forms across research repos.
[concepts/diffusion-models] Diffusion Models - Generative models that learn to reverse a gradual noising process. Implemented in transformers-cv.
[concepts/lora-theory] LoRA Theory - A foundational concept in Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) that enables the tuning of gigantic models on consumer hardware.
[concepts/multi-object-tracking] Multi-Object Tracking - Associating detections across video frames to maintain consistent object identities over time. Applied in tennis-vision and field-fusion.
[concepts/object-detection] Object Detection - Localizing and classifying objects in images. Core skill applied in tennis-vision, field-fusion, and implemented from scratch in transformers-cv.
[concepts/rag-architectures] RAG Architectures - Retrieval-Augmented Generation — grounding LLM responses in external knowledge.

## CAREER
[career/ai-internship] AI Internship - First professional AI engineering role. Designed and built a production intelligent research profiling system.
[career/community] Community Contributions - Community
[career/open-source] Open Source Contributions - Open Source

## LEARNING
[learning/machine-and-deep-learning-nlp] Machine-and-Deep-Learning-NLP - Collection of learned techniques and concepts across machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing domains.

## META
[index] Parallax — Index - A self-organizing, digital nervous system for @kernelcrush. Documenting the frontiers of Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and Generative AI from first principles.
[meta/connections] Connections - Cross-domain connection map. Patterns that emerge when the knowledge graph is read as a whole rather than page by page.
